faqItems.a1: Hermes Agent is an open-source, self-improving AI agent built by Nous Research. It can learn from experience, create skills autonomously, and interact through Telegram, Discord, and CLI.
faqItems.a2: Hermes Agent itself is lightweight — it runs on any Linux server, macOS, WSL2, or even Android Termux. The AI model runs remotely via API (OpenRouter, OpenAI, etc.), so no GPU required.
faqItems.a3: Over 200 models including GPT-4, Claude, Llama, Mistral, and any OpenAI-compatible API. You can switch models on-the-fly.
faqItems.a4: Hermes can spawn isolated sub-agents for parallel tasks. Each sub-agent has its own context and can run independently while the host coordinates scheduling.
faqItems.a5: Yes. Hermes runs on your own infrastructure. Your conversations and data stay on your server. No data is sent to third parties except the AI model API you choose.
